Charger.description: Charger infomation for the BMS to broadcast to other boards

ElconControls.description: Control parameters for Elcon charger communication

AvgVoltageStats.description: Average voltages for each segment in the accumulator

AvgTempStats.description: Average temps for each segment in the accumulator

AdbmsThermOwc.description: Therm GPIO OWC results for all segments

SegCommOk.description: SPI communication OK status for each ADBMS segment

SegVD.description: ADBMS digital supply voltage per segment

SegVD_2.description: ADBMS digital supply voltage per segment (cont)

SegVD_3.description: ADBMS digital supply voltage per segment (cont)

SegVA.description: ADBMS analog supply voltage per segment

SegVA_2.description: ADBMS analog supply voltage per segment (cont)

SegVA_3.description: ADBMS analog supply voltage per segment (cont)

SegVRES.description: ADBMS VRES (VREF2 with series resistor for OWC) per segment

SegSupplyFaults.description: ADBMS supply rail OV/UV fault flags per segment

SegDiagFaults.description: ADBMS trim error and supply delta fault flags per segment

SegMiscFaults.description: ADBMS misc fault flags per segment

CellOV.description: Per-cell overvoltage flags from ADBMS STATD

CellUV.description: Per-cell undervoltage flags from ADBMS STATD
